headline: Jim Cramer Highlights Dell Technologies’ Success
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) is one of the S&P 500 stocks that Jim Cramer shared his take on. Cramer showed optimistic sentiment toward the company’s stock, as he remarked: Next up… was another data center play with a fantastic bang-up quarter last week, Dell Technologies, up 29.4%. headline: Info-Tech Research Group Bolsters Executive Bench as Market Appetite Shifts to Outcomes-Focused Advisory Model
summary: Info-Tech Research Group, a global leader in IT research and advisory services, today announced the appointment of three senior executives to its leadership team: Craig Montgomery as Chief Marketing Officer, Brad Sprecher as Chief Revenue Officer, and Frank Brilliant as Senior Vice President of New Member Acquisition, focusing on member acquisition and growth.

headline: Apple’s New MacBook Is Cheaper Than an iPhone. Why That’s Such a Big Deal.
summary: Apple  has launched its most affordable laptop as memory costs surge and competitors raise prices.  The MacBook Neo, the company’s new laptop, is offered in four colors, including silver, a light pink, yellow, and blue.  The MacBook Neo comes with Apple’s A18 Pro chip and starts at $599.

headline: Dell’s Rugged PowerEdge XR9700 Targets Edge AI And 5G Growth
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has introduced the ruggedized, liquid cooled PowerEdge XR9700 server, aimed at edge AI and 5G use cases. The launch targets telecom and industrial deployments that need AI processing and cloud RAN in outdoor or space constrained settings. This move sits alongside Dell’s broader AI infrastructure push, including its Dataloop acquisition and partnerships with early stage AI companies. For investors watching NYSE:DELL, this product story sits on top of a share...

headline: Binarly Announces Leadership Transition as Enterprise Demand Accelerates for Supply-Chain Security
summary: SANTA MONICA, Calif., March 04, 2026--Binarly, the industry leader in software and firmware supply‑chain security, today announced a leadership transition as the company enters its next phase of growth. Founder and current CEO Alex Matrosov has joined the company’s Board, and Gwenyth Castro has joined as Chief Executive Officer to scale global go-to-market and enterprise growth.

raw.headline: Binarly Announces Leadership Transition as Enterprise Demand Accelerates for Supply-Chain Security

Founder and current CEO Alex Matrosov has joined the company’s Board, and Gwenyth Castro has joined as Chief Executive Officer to scale global go-to-market and enterprise growth.
